title: GoDaddy App to Offer Mobile QR Code Payments
text: GoDaddy is offering a way to streamline payments for small businesses, both in eCommerce and in person, through QR codes for on-the-go transactions, a press release said Tuesday (Feb. 15). The release said the service would be ideal for small businesses, such as farmer's market vendors who don't want to invest in a point-of-sale (POS) […]

title: 7 Stocks in the Crosshairs of Activist Investors
text: Stocks haven't performed well so far in 2022. That's given activist investors lots of possible opportunities.

title: GoDaddy (GDDY) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Outpace Estimates
text: GoDaddy (GDDY) reports solid fourth-quarter results driven by strong product demand across all segments. Further, higher subscription to Websites + Marketing remains a tailwind.

title: GoDaddy (GDDY) Stock: $3 Billion Share Repurchase Plan Announced
text: GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE: GDDY) announced a multi-year $3 billion share repurchase plan along with its Q4 and FY 2021 results. These are the details.

title: Why GoDaddy Shares Are Up 10% Today
text: The web-hosting company reported solid fourth-quarter numbers, but don't be too quick to jump into this stock.

title: GoDaddy Inc. (GDDY) CEO Aman Bhutani on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: GoDaddy Inc. (GDDY) CEO Aman Bhutani on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: GoDaddy (GDDY) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: GoDaddy (GDDY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 26.83% and 5.03%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: 3 Internet Delivery Stocks to Watch in a Challenging Industry
text: The Zacks Internet - Delivery Services industry players like GoDaddy (GDDY), QuinStreet (QNST) and Asure Software (ASUR) are poised to benefit from the reopening of economies, and surging smartphone and Internet penetration in the emerging markets.
